footer.tagline: Free tools for developers and everyday users. Built with care by AlwizBA.

hero.subtitle: Free tools for developers and everyday users. No sign-up needed.

base64.name: Base64 Encode/Decode
base64.desc: Encode or decode text to Base64. Supports UTF-8, Latin-1, Hex, Binary, UTF-16, and MIME.
base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.subtitle: Encode or decode text with multiple encoding and output format options.
base64.aboutText: Base64 encodes binary data as ASCII text using 64 printable characters. UTF-8 is the standard for Unicode text. Latin-1 handles single-byte legacy encodings. Hex lets you encode raw byte sequences. Binary converts 0/1 strings to bytes. UTF-16 is used in Windows and .NET environments. MIME format wraps lines at 76 characters as per RFC 2045.

hash.name: Hash Generator
hash.desc: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes. Supports HMAC with a secret key.
hash.title: Hash Generator
hash.subtitle: Generate cryptographic hashes from any text. Optional HMAC secret.
hash.hmacHint: When set, all outputs become HMAC-signed hashes
hash.aboutText: Hash functions produce a fixed-size output from any input. MD5 and SHA-1 are insecure for cryptography but fine for checksums. Use SHA-256 or higher for security. HMAC adds a secret key for message authentication.

opengraph.name: Open Graph Checker
opengraph.desc: Check and preview OG meta & Twitter Card from any URL
opengraph.title: Open Graph Checker
opengraph.subtitle: Check and preview Open Graph meta tags and Twitter Card from any URL.
opengraph.urlHint: Make sure the URL includes https://

urlCodec.name: URL Encoder/Decoder
urlCodec.desc: Encode or decode URLs. Supports encodeURIComponent, encodeURI, double-encode, and RFC 3986.
urlCodec.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
urlCodec.subtitle: Encode or decode URLs with different modes for different situations.
urlCodec.inputPlaceholder: Paste a URL or text to encode/decode...
urlCodec.decodeFail: Failed to decode. Input may not be valid URL-encoded text.
urlCodec.aboutText: encodeURIComponent encodes everything except unreserved characters. encodeURI preserves characters valid in a full URL. Double encoding is useful when embedding one URL inside another. RFC 3986 strict mode encodes all reserved characters.

jsonFormatter.name: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.desc: Format, validate, minify, and sort JSON keys. Shows character and key count.
jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter & Validator
jsonFormatter.subtitle: Format, validate, minify, and sort your JSON with statistics.
jsonFormatter.aboutText: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data format. Formatting makes it readable. Minifying removes whitespace to reduce size. Sorting keys helps with diffs and version control.

uuid.name: UUID Generator
uuid.desc: Generate UUID v4 in bulk with uppercase, lowercase, or no-hyphen format.
uuid.title: UUID Generator
uuid.subtitle: Generate UUID v4 in bulk with custom format options.

password.name: Password Generator
password.desc: Generate strong random passwords or memorable passphrases.
password.title: Password Generator
password.subtitle: Generate strong passwords or memorable word-based passphrases.
password.noAmbiguous: Avoid ambiguous characters (0, O, l, I)
password.minOneType: Choose at least one character type
password.pickOne: Pick at least one character type

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert Unix timestamps to readable dates, or dates to timestamps.
timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.subtitle: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa.
timestamp.aboutText: Unix time counts seconds since January 1, 1970 00:00:00 UTC. JavaScript typically uses milliseconds (13-digit timestamps).

color.name: Color Converter
color.desc: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, CMYK, and RGBA color formats.
color.title: Color Converter
color.subtitle: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, and CMYK color formats.
color.pickColorHint: Click the swatch or type a HEX value
color.aboutText: HEX is the standard for CSS/HTML. RGB uses red, green, blue channels (0-255). HSL uses hue, saturation, lightness. HSV uses hue, saturation, value. CMYK is used for print.

text.name: Text Analyzer
text.desc: Count words, characters, sentences. Transform case, reverse, deduplicate lines, and more.
text.title: Text Analyzer
text.subtitle: Analyze and transform text — stats, case conversion, and utilities.
text.aboutText: This tool provides real-time statistics and quick transformations. Useful for content writing, SEO, code cleanup, and data processing.

qrcode.name: QR Code Generator
qrcode.desc: Create QR codes from text or URL
qrcode.title: QR Code Generator
qrcode.subtitle: Generate QR codes from any URL, text, or content.

jwt.name: JWT Decoder
jwt.desc: Decode JWT tokens client-side. Inspect header, payload, and expiry without a secret.
jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.subtitle: Decode and inspect JWT tokens without a secret key. Header, payload, and expiry at a glance.
jwt.signatureNote: Signature is not verified — this tool is for inspection only.
jwt.invalidToken: Invalid JWT format. Must have 3 dot-separated parts.
jwt.aboutText: JSON Web Tokens have three base64url-encoded parts: Header, Payload (claims), and Signature. This tool decodes the first two client-side. Never share tokens with sensitive data in public tools.

regex.name: Regex Tester
regex.desc: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting, capture groups, and flag support.
regex.title: Regex Tester
regex.subtitle: Test and debug regular expressions with live highlighting and match details.
regex.aboutText: Regular expressions match text patterns. The global (g) flag finds all matches. Case-insensitive (i) ignores letter case. Multiline (m) makes ^ and $ match line boundaries. dotAll (s) makes . match newlines too.

htmlEntity.name: HTML Entity Encoder/Decoder
htmlEntity.desc: Encode and decode HTML entities. Supports named, decimal, and hex formats.
htmlEntity.title: HTML Entity Encoder / Decoder
htmlEntity.subtitle: Encode or decode HTML special characters using named, decimal, or hex formats.
htmlEntity.aboutText: HTML entities represent special characters that have meaning in HTML syntax. Encoding prevents XSS vulnerabilities and ensures characters display correctly. Named entities are human-readable, decimal and hex are numeric references.

imageToBase64.name: Image to Base64
imageToBase64.desc: Convert image files to Base64 data URIs. Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP.
imageToBase64.title: Image to Base64
imageToBase64.subtitle: Convert any image file to a Base64 data URI for embedding in HTML or CSS.
imageToBase64.dropLabel: Drop an image here or click to browse
imageToBase64.dropHint: Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, SVG, BMP
imageToBase64.aboutText: Base64 encoding converts binary image data to ASCII text, allowing images to be embedded directly in HTML, CSS, or JSON without a separate file request. The output includes a data URI prefix specifying the MIME type.

xmlFormatter.name: XML Formatter
xmlFormatter.desc: Format, validate, and minify XML documents. Highlights errors.
xmlFormatter.title: XML Formatter & Validator
xmlFormatter.subtitle: Format, validate, and minify XML with real-time error highlighting.
xmlFormatter.aboutText: XML (Extensible Markup Language) is a widely used data format for configuration files, APIs, and document storage. Formatting improves readability, while minifying reduces file size. Validation helps catch syntax errors early.

markdownPreview.name: Markdown Preview
markdownPreview.desc: Render Markdown with live preview. Supports GFM tables, code blocks, and more.
markdownPreview.title: Markdown Preview
markdownPreview.subtitle: Write Markdown and see a live rendered preview side by side.
markdownPreview.aboutText: Markdown is a lightweight markup language for formatting plain text. GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) adds tables, task lists, strikethrough, and syntax-highlighted code blocks. This tool renders your Markdown in real time.

sqlFormatter.name: SQL Formatter
sqlFormatter.desc: Format and beautify SQL queries. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and more.
sqlFormatter.title: SQL Formatter
sqlFormatter.subtitle: Beautify and format SQL queries for improved readability.
sqlFormatter.aboutText: Properly formatted SQL is easier to read, debug, and maintain. This tool normalizes keyword casing, indents nested clauses, and aligns elements consistently regardless of the original formatting.

loremIpsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
loremIpsum.desc: Generate placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words.
loremIpsum.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
loremIpsum.subtitle: Generate placeholder text for layouts and design mockups.
loremIpsum.aboutText: Lorem Ipsum is placeholder text derived from Cicero's De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum. It has been the industry standard dummy text since the 1500s, used to fill space in layouts without distracting with readable content.

cron.name: Cron Expression Parser
cron.desc: Parse and explain cron expressions. Shows next 5 execution times.
cron.title: Cron Expression Parser
cron.subtitle: Parse cron expressions and preview upcoming execution times.
cron.aboutText: Cron expressions define schedules for recurring tasks. Each field represents: minute (0-59), hour (0-23), day of month (1-31), month (1-12), day of week (0-7, where 0 and 7 are Sunday). Special characters: * (any), , (list), - (range), / (step).

stringEscape.name: String Escape / Unescape
stringEscape.desc: Escape or unescape strings for JavaScript, JSON, HTML, SQL, and RegEx.
stringEscape.title: String Escape / Unescape
stringEscape.subtitle: Escape or unescape strings for use in different contexts.
stringEscape.aboutText: Different contexts require different escaping rules. JavaScript uses backslash sequences. JSON requires strict escaping of control characters. HTML escaping prevents XSS. SQL escaping prevents injection attacks. RegEx escaping neutralizes meta-characters.

chmod.name: Chmod Calculator
chmod.desc: Calculate Unix file permissions. Toggle bits or enter numeric/symbolic mode.
chmod.title: Chmod Calculator
chmod.subtitle: Calculate Unix file permissions using checkboxes, numeric, or symbolic notation.
chmod.aboutText: Unix file permissions use three sets of read/write/execute bits for owner, group, and others. The numeric (octal) form represents each set as a digit from 0-7. Symbolic notation uses r, w, x letters. Special bits include setuid (4), setgid (2), and sticky (1).

numberBase.name: Number Base Converter
numberBase.desc: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal.
numberBase.title: Number Base Converter
numberBase.subtitle: Convert numbers between decimal, binary, octal, and hexadecimal.
numberBase.aboutText: Number bases define how many digits a numeral system uses. Decimal (base 10) is everyday arithmetic. Binary (base 2) is used in computers. Octal (base 8) is used in Unix permissions. Hexadecimal (base 16) is used in memory addresses and color codes.

csvJson.name: CSV to JSON
csvJson.desc: Convert CSV to JSON or JSON to CSV. Supports custom delimiters.
csvJson.title: CSV to JSON Converter
csvJson.subtitle: Convert between CSV and JSON formats with custom delimiter support.
csvJson.aboutText: CSV (Comma-Separated Values) is a simple tabular format compatible with spreadsheets and databases. JSON is a hierarchical format used in APIs and web applications. Converting between them is a common data processing task.

diff.name: Text Diff
diff.desc: Compare two texts line by line and highlight differences.
diff.title: Text Diff Checker
diff.subtitle: Compare two texts and highlight added, removed, and changed lines.
diff.aboutText: A diff compares two versions of text and highlights what was added, removed, or changed. This tool performs a line-by-line comparison, useful for reviewing code changes, document revisions, or configuration differences.

caseConverter.name: Case Converter
caseConverter.desc: Convert text between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and more.
caseConverter.title: Case Converter
caseConverter.subtitle: Convert text between multiple programming and typographic case formats.
caseConverter.aboutText: Different naming conventions are used across languages and contexts. camelCase and PascalCase are common in JavaScript. snake_case is standard in Python and databases. kebab-case is used in CSS and URLs. SCREAMING_SNAKE is used for constants.

hexCodec.name: Hex Encode/Decode
hexCodec.desc: Encode text to hexadecimal or decode hex back to text.
hexCodec.title: Hex Encode / Decode
hexCodec.subtitle: Convert text to hex representation and back, with configurable separator and case.
hexCodec.aboutText: Hexadecimal (base-16) encoding represents each byte as two hex digits (00-FF). It is commonly used in debugging, cryptography, and low-level data inspection.

percentEncode.name: Percent Encode/Decode
percentEncode.desc: Encode or decode URI components using percent-encoding (%XX).
percentEncode.title: Percent (URI) Encoding
percentEncode.subtitle: Encode or decode URL components with configurable encoding modes.
percentEncode.aboutText: Percent encoding replaces unsafe ASCII characters with a % followed by two hex digits. encodeURIComponent is the most common and encodes everything except letters, digits, and -_.!~*'(). encodeURI leaves characters that are valid in a full URI intact.

totp.name: TOTP Generator
totp.desc: Generate Time-based One-Time Passwords (TOTP) compatible with Google Authenticator.
totp.title: TOTP Generator
totp.subtitle: Generate and verify time-based one-time passwords using a base32 secret key.
totp.emptyState: Enter a secret key and click Generate.
totp.aboutText: TOTP (Time-based OTP) generates a short-lived code from a shared secret key and the current time, as defined in RFC 6238. It is used in two-factor authentication apps like Google Authenticator. The secret key must be base32-encoded.

cspBuilder.name: CSP Header Builder
cspBuilder.desc: Build Content Security Policy headers visually with checkbox controls.
cspBuilder.title: CSP Header Builder
cspBuilder.subtitle: Visually configure Content-Security-Policy directives and get a ready-to-use header.
cspBuilder.aboutText: Content Security Policy (CSP) is an HTTP response header that helps prevent XSS, clickjacking, and other code injection attacks. It specifies which dynamic resources are allowed to load.

yamlFormatter.name: YAML Formatter
yamlFormatter.desc: Format and validate YAML. Convert between YAML and JSON.
yamlFormatter.title: YAML Formatter / Validator
yamlFormatter.subtitle: Format, validate, and convert YAML to JSON or JSON to YAML.
yamlFormatter.aboutText: YAML (YAML Ain't Markup Language) is a human-friendly data serialization format commonly used for configuration files (Docker Compose, GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, etc.).

tomlFormatter.name: TOML Formatter
tomlFormatter.desc: Format TOML files and convert between TOML and JSON.
tomlFormatter.title: TOML Formatter
tomlFormatter.subtitle: Parse, format, and convert TOML to JSON or JSON to TOML.
tomlFormatter.aboutText: TOML (Tom's Obvious Minimal Language) is a minimal configuration file format used in Rust (Cargo.toml), Hugo, and many other projects. It is designed to be easy to read and write.

nanoId.name: Nano ID Generator
nanoId.desc: Generate Nano IDs — URL-safe, compact unique identifiers.
nanoId.title: Nano ID Generator
nanoId.subtitle: Generate URL-safe compact unique IDs with custom size and alphabet.
nanoId.errAlphabet: Alphabet must have at least 2 characters
nanoId.aboutText: Nano ID is a tiny, secure, URL-friendly unique string ID generator. It generates shorter IDs compared to UUID while maintaining uniqueness. Commonly used in modern JavaScript applications as a lightweight UUID alternative.

fakeData.name: Fake Data Generator
fakeData.desc: Generate realistic fake data for testing and seeding databases.
fakeData.title: Fake Data Generator
fakeData.subtitle: Generate realistic fake names, emails, addresses and more for testing.
fakeData.errNoFields: Please select at least one field
fakeData.aboutText: Fake data is useful for populating test databases, creating demo content, and testing UI with realistic-looking information without using real personal data.

envParser.name: .env Parser
envParser.desc: Parse, edit, and export .env files to various formats.
envParser.title: .env Parser / Formatter
envParser.subtitle: Parse .env files into an editable table and export to JSON, YAML, or Docker format.
envParser.aboutText: .env files store environment variables used to configure applications without hardcoding sensitive values. This tool helps you parse, edit, and convert them to JSON, YAML, or Docker run command format.

gitignore.name: .gitignore Generator
gitignore.desc: Generate .gitignore files for your language, framework, and IDE.
gitignore.title: .gitignore Generator
gitignore.subtitle: Select languages, frameworks, and IDEs to generate a combined .gitignore file.
gitignore.aboutText: A .gitignore file specifies files and directories that Git should ignore. This prevents build artifacts, sensitive files, and OS-specific files from being accidentally committed.

unitConverter.name: Unit Converter
unitConverter.desc: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, and data.
unitConverter.title: Unit Converter
unitConverter.subtitle: Convert between common physical and digital units across multiple categories.
unitConverter.aboutText: Quickly convert between units of measurement across 7 categories: length, weight/mass, temperature, area, volume, speed, and data storage. Useful for everyday calculations and development.

cssUnit.name: CSS Unit Converter
cssUnit.desc: Convert between px, rem, em, vw, vh, pt, and pc CSS units.
cssUnit.title: CSS Unit Converter
cssUnit.subtitle: Convert between CSS units with configurable base font size and viewport dimensions.
cssUnit.aboutText: CSS units like rem and em are relative to font sizes, while vw/vh are relative to the viewport. This converter helps frontend developers quickly translate between them. Adjust the base font size and viewport dimensions to match your project settings.

slugGenerator.name: Slug Generator
slugGenerator.desc: Convert text to URL-friendly slugs for articles, products, and routes.
slugGenerator.title: Slug Generator
slugGenerator.subtitle: Convert any text to a clean URL slug with configurable separator and case options.
slugGenerator.inputPlaceholder: Enter your title or text here...
slugGenerator.aboutText: A URL slug is the human-readable part of a URL that identifies a page. For example, the slug for "Hello World" would be "hello-world". Slugs should be lowercase, use hyphens instead of spaces, and avoid special characters.

httpStatus.name: HTTP Status Codes
httpStatus.desc: Quick reference for all HTTP status codes with descriptions.
httpStatus.title: HTTP Status Code Reference
httpStatus.subtitle: Look up the meaning of any HTTP status code with descriptions and use cases.
httpStatus.searchPlaceholder: Search by code, name or description...
httpStatus.aboutText: HTTP status codes are three-digit numbers returned by a server in response to a client request. They are grouped into five classes: 1xx (informational), 2xx (success), 3xx (redirection), 4xx (client error), and 5xx (server error).

metaTag.name: HTML Meta Tag Generator
metaTag.desc: Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags.
metaTag.title: HTML Meta Tag Generator
metaTag.subtitle: Generate complete HTML meta tags for SEO, Open Graph, and Twitter Cards.
metaTag.aboutText: HTML meta tags provide metadata about a webpage, used by search engines and social platforms. The description tag affects SEO snippets, Open Graph tags control how links appear on Facebook/LinkedIn, and Twitter Card tags do the same for Twitter/X.
